digest.en: Violence spikes in Mali as Islamic militants and separatists claim simultaneous attacks across the country. India advises its nationals to stay indoors and exercise caution due to security developments. Explosions and gunfire are reported in multiple locations, with six killed in Israeli strikes on south Lebanon.
digest.hi: दाऊद गैंग के खास गुर्गे सलीम डोला को तुर्किये में पुलिस ने गिरफ्तार कर लिया। अरविंद केजरीवाल कोलकाता पहुंचे और टीएमसी के समर्थन में प्रचार करेंगे। बंगाल में भाजपा और टीएमसी के दिग्गजों में जुबानी जंग छिड़ी हुई है।

articles.title: India advises nationals in Mali to stay indoors, exercise caution due to security developments
articles.summary: India advised nationals in Mali to stay indoors due to security developments. The Indian embassy is monitoring the situation with Malian authorities. The Indian embassy added that it was closely monitoring the evolving situation in coordination with Malian authorities and will issue further updates as required.

articles.title: Islamic militants, separatists claim simultaneous attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Islamic militants and separatists claimed simultaneous attacks across Mali. The US Embassy in Bamako issued a security alert citing explosions and gunfire. The U. S. Embassy in Bamako issued a security alert citing reports of explosions and gunfire near Kati and the international airport, and urged U. S.

articles.title: NATO Faces Internal Divisions Over Iran Conflict Participation
articles.summary: NATO faces internal divisions over participating in the Iran conflict. Member countries are split on the issue. NATO Faces Internal Divisions Over Iran Conflict Participation Oz Arab Media.

articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, with clashes reported in the centre and north. Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

articles.title: Explosion in southwest Colombia kills at leat seven, state governor says
articles.summary: An explosion in southwest Colombia killed at least seven people on the Pan-American Highway. Authorities in Cauca region demand 'decisive' government action after deadly explosion on Pan-American Highway. Explosion in southwest Colombia kills at leat seven, state governor says.

articles.title: How serious is the rift in NATO?
articles.summary: NATO is divided over joining a potential Iran war. Trump is furious at Europeans for refusing to participate. Trump fury over Europeans' refusal to join Iran war. How serious is the rift in NATO?

articles.title: Family longest held in US immigration detention re-arrested after release
articles.summary: The El Gamal family was re-arrested after being released from 10-month US immigration detention. Lawyers say El Gamal family detained by Trump administration hours after returning home from 10-month detention.

articles.title: Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them
articles.summary: Trump claimed progress in Mideast wars, citing reduced conflict, but grievances remain. Trump claims progress in Mideast wars, but grievances could reignite them AP News.

articles.title: Six killed in Israeli strikes on south Lebanon: Health Ministry
articles.summary: Israeli airstrikes in south Lebanon killed six people, according to the Health Ministry. The strikes targeted projectiles launched from Lebanon, which were intercepted by Israel's military. Hezbollah condemned the strikes as a "blatant violation" of ceasefire understandings.

articles.title: Gaza Civil Defence says Israeli strikes kill 13
articles.summary: Israeli strikes in Gaza killed 13 people, including two police officers, according to the territory's Interior Ministry. The Gaza Civil Defence reported the casualties. According to the territory’s Interior Ministry, two of those were police officers.

articles.title: Trump puts onus on Iran’s authorities as they project hardened stance
articles.summary: US President Trump shifted the blame to Iran's authorities as they hardened their stance on the nuclear issue. Some officials said Tehran must not entertain further talks amid threats and a blockade.

articles.title: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: US President Trump announced that Jared Kushner and Robert Witkoff are no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks. The decision was made public through a live update on CBS News.

articles.title: Israel says it will attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' as four killed in strikes on southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel vowed to attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' after four people were killed in strikes on southern Lebanon. The Israeli military carried out the strikes. Israel says it will attack Hezbollah 'forcefully' as four killed in strikes on southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
articles.summary: Japan is recruiting bodybuilders and athletes to work in nursing homes due to a staff shortage. Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes.

articles.title: Viktor Orbán steps back from Parliament after landslide loss, vows to rebuild Hungary’s ’national
articles.summary: Viktor Orbán stepped back from Hungary's parliament after a landslide loss, vowing to rebuild his party. His caucus will be "radically transformed" and he won't take his seat. Mr. Orbán said his party’s caucus in parliament would be “radically transformed” following the election loss, and that he would not take his seat.

articles.title: Hungary's Orban will not sit in parliament after election loss
articles.summary: Viktor Orbán's party suffered an election loss, and he announced he won't sit in parliament. His party's parliamentary group will undergo significant changes. Hungary's Orban will not sit in parliament after election loss.

articles.title: Gunmen Attack Several Locations Across Mali's Capital
articles.summary: Gunmen attacked multiple locations in Mali's capital, with residents in other cities reporting gunfire and blasts. The attacks occurred across central and northern Mali. Residents in other cities in central and northern Mali reported gunfire and blasts.

articles.title: China Hints Its 4th Aircraft Carrier Will Be Nuclear-Powered
articles.summary: China announced plans to build its fourth aircraft carrier, which will be powered by nuclear energy. This move marks a significant development in China's military capabilities, as it was the last major country to adopt aircraft carriers.

articles.title: Russia pounds Ukraine’s Dnipro for 20 hours straight, killing eight
articles.summary: Mexican authorities are investigating a car crash that killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab. The agents were not permitted to operate in Mexico.

articles.title: Trump says cancelled envoys' Pakistan trip, but Iran war not resuming
articles.summary: US President Trump said he cancelled a planned trip to Pakistan by his envoys, but stated that the Iran war is not resuming. Iran's Foreign Ministry reported Deputy Foreign Minister Araghchi arriving in Muscat for Omani official meetings.

articles.title: 4 Killed In Israeli Airstrikes On Lebanon Amid Fragile Ceasefire
articles.summary: Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon killed four people amid a fragile ceasefire. The Israeli military said it targeted loaded rocket launchers belonging to Hezbollah. The strikes occurred in the southern region of Lebanon near the Israeli border.

articles.title: दाऊद गैंग को लगा बड़ा झटका: गिरफ्तार हुआ खास गुर्गा सलीम डोला; खबरों में दावा- तुर्किये में पुलिस
articles.summary: दाऊद इब्राहिम के खास गुर्गे सलीम डोला को तुर्किये में पुलिस ने गिरफ्तार कर लिया. यह दाऊद गैंग के लिए बड़ा झटका है. सलीम डोला की गिरफ्तारी से गैंग की गतिविधियों पर असर पड़ सकता है.

articles.title: ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर बोले ट्रंप- 'मैंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है'
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प ने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर कहा कि उन्होंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है। यह बयान इस्लामाबाद में ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच जारी तनाव के बीच आया है। ट्रम्प की टिप्पणी ने पश्चिम एशिया में स्थिति को और भी जटिल बना दिया है।

articles.summary: पश्चिम बंगाल में विधानसभा चुनाव के पहले चरण में रिकॉर्ड वोटिंग हुई. जानकार इसके पीछे कई वजहें देख रहे हैं. सबसे अधिक वोट कटने वाले क्षेत्रों में रिकॉर्ड वोटिंग के मायने समझने की कोशिश हो रही है.

articles.title: Miss Sake India 2026 ने भारत-जापान सांस्कृतिक कूटनीति को मज़बूत किया
articles.summary: मिस सेक इंडिया 2026 ने भारत-जापान सांस्कृतिक संबंधों को मजबूत करने के लिए एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम उठाया है। यह कार्यक्रम भारत और जापान के बीच सांस्कृतिक आदान-प्रदान को बढ़ावा देने के लिए आयोजित किया गया था।

articles.title: अमेरिका के लिए भरोसेमंद साथी नहीं, 'सिरदर्द' है पाकिस्तान; इस अमेरिकी रिपोर्ट में हुए कई बड़े खुलासे
articles.summary: एक अमेरिकी रिपोर्ट में कहा गया है कि पाकिस्तान अमेरिका के लिए एक भरोसेमंद साथी नहीं है और वह एक "सिरदर्द" है। इस रिपोर्ट में कई बड़े खुलासे हुए हैं जो पाकिस्तान के साथ अमेरिका के संबंधों पर प्रकाश डालते हैं। यह रिपोर्ट अमेरिका की नीतियों को प्रभावित कर सकती है।

articles.title: जेलेंस्की पुतिन से मिलने को राजी! 50 माह से जारी जंग के बीच रूस-यूक्रेन के बीच सुलह के प्रयास तेज
articles.summary: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति जेलेंस्की ने रूस के राष्ट्रपति पुतिन से मिलने के लिए सहमति जताई है। यह 50 महीनों से जारी जंग के बीच रूस और यूक्रेन के बीच सुलह के प्रयासों में एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम है। जेलेंस्की और पुतिन की बैठक से शांति की उम्मीदें बढ़ी हैं।

articles.title: विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?
articles.summary: विश्व में युद्ध बढ़ रहे हैं और संघर्ष थमने का नाम नहीं ले रहे हैं। कई क्षेत्रों में तनाव बढ़ रहा है और स्थिति गंभीर होती जा रही है। इसके परिणामस्वरूप कई देश प्रभावित हो रहे हैं।
